message:
fix: unpin one dimension preserves the other when pinnedBoth

When pinnedBoth is true (legacy AGENT_CLI_PINNED) and user unpins
just model, the optimistic update now sets pinnedCli=true to match
the server-side migration. Previously clearing pinnedBoth also
made CLI appear unpinned.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
